blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-02-03.
11,243 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
195 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
No questions resolve tomorrow (2026-02-04), but still scan for ones resolving soon (check the resolution_date column in market.csv).

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-02 -> 2026-02-03)

- "Which eastern Ukrainian city will be identified as the site of a deadly market shelling by February 4, 2026?" → Druzhkivka
- "In which town will Saif al-Islam Gaddafi be buried by February 10, 2026?" → Bani Walid
- "Which state will the U.S. Supreme Court let keep its new congressional map by February 2026 after rejecting a Republican lawsuit?" → California
- "In which city will Amnesty International say wrestler Saleh Mohammadi has been sentenced to public execution, by February 14, 2026?" → Qom

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 105 (135 resolved, 195 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.68
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
